{{Expand}}

{{Infobox artifact
| name = Remnant prosthetic
| introduced = Bloodline
}}

== Bloodline ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Lindon]] has a white [[Remnant prosthetic]] arm.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c9">''Bloodline'', chapter 9</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Artifacts]]
[[Category:Bloodline]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle artifacts]]
